public.title: CitiLink - Municipal transparency and citizen participation platform
public.subtitle: More transparency, more participation, better management!
public.description: Enhancing municipal transparency and citizen engagement through AI: from unstructured to structured data.

about.title: About CitiLink
about.description: Discover the mission, vision and objectives of CitiLink. Learn more about how we promote municipal transparency and citizen participation.
about.project_description: CitiLink aims to create artificial intelligence algorithms focused on natural language processing (NLP) to facilitate the understanding of municipal meeting minutes. Specifically, we seek to develop NLP models in European Portuguese capable of transforming the free text of minutes into structured and concise summaries. These summaries should identify the events discussed, grouped by department, and the positions defended by each municipal deputy. The ultimate goal is to create a functional prototype that allows citizens, journalists and political decision-makers to have access to organized information about the topics addressed in municipal meetings. To achieve these objectives, collaboration protocols have been established with six municipalities – Alandroal, Campo Maior, Covilhã, Fundão, Guimarães and Porto – and with the Porto Digital association. The research team is led by professors and researchers from INESC TEC, University of Beira Interior and University of Porto. The project is funded by FCT (Foundation for Science and Technology) under the PRR program - investment "RE-C05-i08 - More Digital Science" - under the call for Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Cybersecurity projects of relevance in Public Administration.
about.resources_description: Access resources related to the CitiLink project.

what_is_citilink.question: What is CitiLink?
what_is_citilink.answer: CitiLink is an artificial intelligence platform that processes municipal meeting minutes to make local government information more accessible to citizens, journalists, and decision-makers.

how_does_it_work.question: How does CitiLink work?
how_does_it_work.answer: We use natural language processing (NLP) algorithms to analyze municipal meeting minutes in European Portuguese and transform them into structured summaries, identifying topics by department and voting positions.

which_municipalities.question: Which municipalities participate in CitiLink?
which_municipalities.answer: Currently, six municipalities collaborate with CitiLink: Alandroal, Campo Maior, Covilhã, Fundão, Guimarães, and Porto, along with the Porto Digital association.

data_privacy.question: How is data privacy protected?
data_privacy.answer: All data used comes from public municipal meeting minutes. However, any personally identifiable information has been removed or anonymized to ensure compliance with data protection standards.

who_funds_project.question: Who funds this project?
who_funds_project.answer: The project is funded by FCT (Foundation for Science and Technology) under the PRR program - investment "RE-C05-i08 - More Digital Science" - focusing on AI, Data Science and Cybersecurity projects relevant to Public Administration.

contact_team.question: How can I contact the team?
contact_team.answer: You can reach out to us through our contact page or email us directly for any questions, suggestions, or technical issues.

data_processing.question: How is the data processed and what about accuracy?
data_processing.answer: We use advanced AI algorithms to process municipal meeting minutes, but like all automated systems, errors can occur. These may include misinterpretations of technical terms, incorrect speaker identification, or misclassification of topics. To ensure accuracy, our team performs human validation on processed data, cross-referencing AI-generated summaries with original documents. We continuously improve our algorithms based on feedback and validation results. If you notice any errors in the processed information, please contact us so we can review and correct them.

report_error.question: I found an error or mistake, what can I do?
report_error.answer: If you discover any errors in our platform, we encourage you to report them immediately. You can contact us through our contact page or send us an email with details about the error, including the specific page or document where you found it. Please provide as much context as possible, such as the municipality, meeting date, and a description of the incorrect information. Our team will review your report promptly and make the necessary corrections. Your feedback helps us improve the accuracy and reliability of CitiLink for everyone.

content_validated_message: The content of the minutes was automatically generated using Artificial Intelligence and has been validated by a human. Even so, the information may not be 100% accurate.
content_not_validated_message: The content of the minutes was automatically generated using Artificial Intelligence and has not yet been reviewed by a human. The information may not be 100% accurate.

subjects_content_not_validated_message: The content of the subject was automatically generated using Artificial Intelligence and has not yet been reviewed by a human. The information may not be 100% accurate.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Notice
privacyPolicy.welcome: Welcome to CITILINK, the first Portuguese platform dedicated to municipal transparency and citizen participation.
privacyPolicy.welcomeDescription: We are committed to protecting your privacy and data subjects' rights. This Privacy Notice outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard personal information through the use of this website.

section1.title: 1. Purpose of processing and legal basis
section1.intro: CitiLink processes Personal Data in accordance with the provisions of the General Data Protection Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2016/679, hereinafter referred to as the GDPR) and Portuguese legislation applicable to Data Protection.
section1.useInfo: We use your personal information to:
section1.consent: We process such data only with your consent or otherwise when they are necessary in order to providing services you adhered to.
section1.publicData: Citilink also processes certain personal data (of public officers holders) contained in documents made public by Municipalities in their respective websites, on the grounds of a legal obligation which relates to the value of transparency in public decisions. However, and despite the public nature of the documents in questions, personal data not referring to holders of public office positions were removed from the file you may consult by means of this website.
section1.legalBasis: The legal basis used in this case corresponds to Article 6(1)(f) of the GDPR: 'Processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, except where such interests are overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject which require protection of personal data (...)'
section1.legitimateInterests: The legitimate interests pursued by CitiLink are:
section1.interest1: to build a repository of publications from municipal institutions;
section1.interest2: to provide a platform where researchers and municipal personnel can add, validate and consult information;
section1.interest3: to provide a platform that enables institutions to obtain valuable insights;
section1.interest4: to ensure transparency by allowing anyone to scrutinise and consult municipal decisions and documents.

section2.title: 2. Personal data
section2.intro: The website collects minimal personal information to provide our services:
section2.newsletter: Newsletter Subscription: If you choose to subscribe to our newsletter, we collect only your email address (required) and optionally, your name. No account creation, username, or password is required.
section2.usageData: Usage and Log Data: For security, performance monitoring, and service improvement purposes, we automatically collect and store in our logs the following technical information:
section2.logItem1: IP address (Internet Protocol address of your device)
section2.publicDocuments: As already mentioned the website serves the purposes of the CitiLink research project which is aimed at enhancing municipal transparency. Therefore, by using this website the user will be able consult documents made public according to the Law by Municipalities, where certain personal data are present, in particular when the names of public office holders are mentioned.

section3.title: 3. Responsible for the processing
section3.controller: The data controller is INESC TEC – Instituto de Engenharia de Sistemas e Computadores, Tecnologia e Ciência, Campus da FEUP, Rua Dr. Roberto Frias, 4200 - 465 Porto, Portugal.

section4.title: 4. Personal data retention period
section4.retention: The data you provide for subscribing to the newsletter will be kept on a distribution list until you choose to cancel the subscription. In that case, your data will be automatically deleted from our information systems.

section5.title: 5. Personal data sharing
section5.sharing: All data, including personal data, is stored on INESC TEC servers located within Portuguese territory. No international data transfers take place.

section6.title: 6. Security measures
section6.intro: We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
section6.measures: Some of the measures implemented in the processing of personal data: encrypted data transmission and access control.

section7.title: 7. Rights of the data subject
section7.intro: As the subject of the data, the law grants you the following rights: Information, Access, Rectification, Portability, Erasure, and Restriction of processing.
section7.exercise: To exercise any of your rights please use the following email address: citilink@inesctec.pt
section7.complaint: Under the terms of the Article 77 of the GDPR, the data subject has the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority in the European Union. In Portugal, the supervisory authority is the CNPD (www.cnpd.pt).

section8.title: 8. Data Protection Officer
section8.contact: For any questions regarding the processing of your personal data, please contact our Data Protection Officer at: dpo@inesctec.pt.

privacyPolicy.updateNotice: This privacy notice was updated on October 03, 2025.
